title: Add feature with tests and docs
description: Tests sequential tool use with dependencies
prompt:
Add a new feature to `src/api/users.ts`: a `getUserStats` function that returns user statistics (postCount, lastLogin). Then:
1. Add a test for this function in `src/api/users.test.ts`
2. Document the new function in `docs/API.md`
3. Export the function from the main module

create_files.docs/API.md:
# API Documentation

## Users

### getUser(id)
Get a user by ID.

### listUsers()
List all users.
